goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'kings lynn' and should 'arrive by 20:15'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'monday'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'price'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'all saints church'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'postcode', and 'attraction type'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from kings lynn and should arrive by 20:15
The train should go to cambridge and should leave on monday
Make sure you get travel time and price
You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called all saints church
Make sure you get phone number, postcode, and attraction type
